news.t: KraneShares Connects NYSE to ADX with the First US ETFs to Cross List in the Region
KraneShares Adds Washington State Carbon Market to Global Carbon Strategy ETF (KRBN)

overview.description: The KraneShares Global Carbon Strategy ETF (KRBN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Global Carbon Credit index. The fund seeks to track a carbon credit futures index that weights holdings based on trade volume. The fund holds December futures from three major cap-and-trade programs KRBN was launched on Jul 30, 2020 and is issued by KraneShares.
